stemHtml:
Refer to figure or to CAP 696 Figure 4.12.
Given the following information, calculate the Zero Fuel Mass (ZFM) index:

Take-off Mass: 51 720 kg
Take-off Fuel: 10 080 kg
Fuel index: -2.1
Zero Fuel Mass: 41 640 kg
Dry Operating Mass: 39 000 kg
Dry Operating Index: 38.0
Basic empty Mass: 38 690 kg
Basic empty Index: 43.0
Passenger: 30 Males seated
CPT 0a: 10 passengers
CPT 0f: 10 passengers
CPT 0g: 10 passengers
No Cargo or baggage
